title: We are not the same Tamil Lyrics

kaasu vanthaa koodum uravu

uravu, odum piragu

cuz,

we are not the same
we are not the same, we are not the same

payanigalin kanivaana gavanathirku
yaaraavudhu ungalidam

vaaya katti seppaan panaththa

seppaan.. enna kizhippaan

koadi koadi kollai adippaan

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a message of individuality and resilience, emphasizing that despite differences, one can stand strong.

In which movie does this song appear?

The song is from the movie Soodhu Kavvum 2.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by Anthonydasan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music is composed by Edwin Louis Viswanath.

When was the song released?

The song was released on March 30, 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In We Are Not The Same, the vibrant energy of Anthonydasan's voice brings to life a theme of individuality and strength. The song serves as a powerful anthem for those who embrace their uniqueness, resonating with listeners through its catchy beats and engaging lyrics. Set against the backdrop of Soodhu Kavvum 2, it captures the essence of celebration and resilience. The lively composition by Edwin Louis Viswanath complements the lyrics penned by La. Varadhan, making it a standout track for any upbeat occasion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: We Are Not The Same is an electrifying anthem that showcases Anthonydasan's powerful vocals paired with Edwin Louis Viswanath's dynamic composition. This song captures the essence of individuality and resilience, making it a perfect addition to any celebration. Dive into the vibrant beats and compelling lyrics that resonate with the spirit of being unique!
stanzaMeanings: There are people who are cunning, there are those who take advantage, there are those who deceive, and there are those who commit robbery. This is how many of them exist.
but.. we are not the same, we are not the same we are not the same, we are not the same we are not the same, we are not the same
Even if you like something from a distance, it doesn't mean you can have it.
When money comes, relationships grow, but when difficulties arise, relationships fade away.
because, we are not the same we are not the same both are not the same we are not the same we are not the same, we are not the same
For the benefit of the people, who is there to speak with love? Don't trust them, they will give you biscuits, water bottles, or whatever they can get.
They will speak with their mouths, eat the money, and then say they are rich.. what a joke!
The thief is cunning, he acts well, he drinks well.. he dances well too.
but we are not the same, we are not the same we are not the same, we are not the same we are not the same, we are not the same
They will talk in style, show off, and flaunt their cell phones... what a show-off!
He will come with a false promise and give you money.. he will give you a fake smile.
There are people who are cunning, there are those who take advantage, there are those who deceive, and there are those who commit robbery. This is how many of them exist.
we are not the same we are not the same both are not the same we are not the same
